create.title: New API Key
create.description: Create a new API key for automation or agent access.
create.roleHelper: New keys are viewer (read-only) for now.

secret.title: API Key Created
secret.description: Copy this key now — it will not be shown again.
secret.label: secret
secret.helper: This is the only time the full key will be shown. Store it securely.

delete.title: Revoke API Key?
delete.description: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? This action cannot be undone.
delete.body: The API key {{name}} will immediately stop working. Any agent or automation using it will lose access.
delete.errorFallback: Failed to revoke API key. Please try again.
